title: taraxacum stenocephalum subsp. stenocephalum
intro: Taraxacum stenocephalum subsp. stenocephalum, also known as the narrow-leaved dandelion, is a subspecies of the dandelion plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum stenocephalum subsp. stenocephalum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas and tinctures, can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
